@for (item of slots; track $index; let i = $index) {
{{ getDayName(i) }}
{{ util.appTranslate('breakfast') }}
@for (slot of getSlotsByType(item.times, 'breakfast'); track slot.time) {
edit delete
}
{{ util.appTranslate('lunch') }}
@for (slot of getSlotsByType(item.times, 'lunch'); track slot.time) {
edit delete
}
{{ util.appTranslate('dinner') }}
@for (slot of getSlotsByType(item.times, 'dinner'); track slot.time) {
edit delete
}
}
